variant_name: 高父 — 提亲时的官员家主形象
trigger: 沈家携媒人上门提亲时，高父以官员兼父亲身份坐镇正堂，面对女儿当众退雁与沈词对峙的局面。

appearance_delta.face: 神情比主设定更严肃克制，眉间皱纹更深，带有当堂应对婚事风波的审慎与压抑惊疑
appearance_delta.body: 坐姿端正，肩背强撑威仪，清瘦感在正堂礼制场合下更显挺拔
appearance_delta.hair: 发髻梳理得更为整肃，鬓角微白被收拾得一丝不乱
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 兼具官场礼法与慈父护短气质，表面沉稳，实则全神戒备观察女儿与沈词

costume_override.outfit: 四品官员常服，配官帽或端正规制头冠，衣料整洁但不过分张扬，适合在正堂会客议亲

visual_reference: middle-aged ancient Chinese official father in a formal reception hall, thin dignified scholar-official, kind but worried face, visible forehead and eye wrinkles, slightly graying temples, neat official topknot, dark teal and brown rank robe, seated upright in the main hall, observing a tense marriage proposal scene, warm fatherly presence mixed with restrained authority, realistic historical costume, cinematic lighting
